name: 🤖 AI Influencer Factory v2 — Content Engine (Fixed)

messages.content: You are an expert AI influencer strategist. Create detailed virtual influencer identities. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no backticks.

={{ 'Create a character sheet for this AI influencer:

Name: ' + $json.name + '
Handle: ' + $json.handle + '
Niche: ' + $json.niche + '
Gender: ' + $json.gender + '
Age: ' + $json.age + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Personality: ' + $json.personality + '
Visual Aesthetic: ' + $json.aesthetic + '
Physical: ' + $json.physicalDesc + '

Return this EXACT JSON:
{
  "bio": "Instagram bio under 150 chars with 1-2 emojis",
  "backstory": "3-4 sentence origin story",
  "personality_traits": ["trait1", "trait2", "trait3", "trait4", "trait5"],
  "content_pillars": ["pillar1", "pillar2", "pillar3", "pillar4"],
  "caption_style": "2 sentences on how they write captions",
  "signature_elements": "3 visual signatures for recognition",
  "target_audience": "Who follows them and why",
  "master_prompt": "Detailed Ideogram prompt describing EXACT physical appearance for consistent AI image generation. Include face shape, skin tone, hair, eyes, body type, default outfit, expression. End with: photorealistic, shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, Instagram lifestyle photography.",
  "hashtag_bank": ["20 relevant hashtags"]
}' }}

You are an Instagram content strategist. Create detailed content calendars with ready-to-use Ideogram AI image prompts. Return ONLY valid JSON array. No markdown, no backticks, no wrapper object — just a raw JSON array.

={{ 'Create days 1-15 of a 30-day Instagram calendar for ' + $json.name + ' (' + $json.handle + '), a ' + $json.niche + ' influencer.

Master appearance: ' + $json.character.master_prompt + '
Caption style: ' + $json.character.caption_style + '
Pillars: ' + $json.character.content_pillars.join(', ') + '

Return a JSON ARRAY (not object) of 15 items. Each item:
{
  "day": 1,
  "type": "Feed Post or Carousel or Reel or Story",
  "photo_description": "What the image shows",
  "ideogram_prompt": "FULL Ideogram prompt starting with her exact appearance description then adding this specific scene, outfit, location, lighting. Must be detailed enough to copy-paste directly into Ideogram.",
  "caption": "2-3 line Instagram caption ending with engagement question",
  "hashtags": "15 hashtags as string",
  "posting_time": "Time in IST"
}

Mix: 6 feed posts, 3 carousels, 4 reels, 2 story days. Make it feel like a REAL person.' }}

You are an Instagram content strategist. Create detailed content calendars with ready-to-use Ideogram AI image prompts. Return ONLY valid JSON array. No markdown, no backticks, no wrapper object — just a raw JSON array.

={{ 'Create days 16-30 of a 30-day Instagram calendar for ' + $json.name + ' (' + $json.handle + '), a ' + $json.niche + ' influencer.

Master appearance: ' + $json.character.master_prompt + '
Caption style: ' + $json.character.caption_style + '
Pillars: ' + $json.character.content_pillars.join(', ') + '

Return a JSON ARRAY of 15 items (days 16-30). Each item:
{
  "day": 16,
  "type": "Feed Post or Carousel or Reel or Story",
  "photo_description": "What the image shows",
  "ideogram_prompt": "FULL Ideogram prompt starting with her exact appearance description then adding this specific scene, outfit, location, lighting.",
  "caption": "2-3 line Instagram caption ending with engagement question",
  "hashtags": "15 hashtags as string",
  "posting_time": "Time in IST"
}

Mix: 6 feed posts, 3 carousels, 4 reels, 2 story days. Vary content from days 1-15.' }}
You are an Instagram content creator and brand outreach specialist. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no backticks.

={{ 'Create carousel scripts and brand pitch emails for:

Influencer: ' + $json.name + ' (' + $json.handle + ')
Niche: ' + $json.niche + '
Personality: ' + $json.personality + '
Bio: ' + $json.character.bio + '
Target Audience: ' + $json.character.target_audience + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '

Return this JSON:
{
  "carousels": [4 carousels, each with "title" and "slides" array of 7 items with "slide_num", "headline" (under 8 words), "body" (1-2 sentences)],
  "brand_pitches": [5 pitches, each with "brand_type", "subject", "body" (under 150 words, include engagement rate 5-8%, collaboration proposal, rate range in INR)]
}' }}

parameters.formDescription: Enter your virtual influencer's details. AI will generate the complete identity, 30-day content calendar with Ideogram prompts, carousel scripts, and brand pitch emails.

values.placeholder: e.g. Long dark brown hair, warm brown skin, athletic build, almond-shaped eyes

parameters.subject: ={{ '🤖 AI Influencer Ready: ' + $json.name + ' — Character + 30-Day Calendar + Prompts + Pitches' }}

json.Specific Physical Description: Long dark brown hair, warm brown skin, athletic build, almond-shaped eyes
